architecture.summary: Rely on user git credentials (SSH/credential manager). Auto-detect URL format from source arg. HTTPS default for shorthand. No PAT from config.

integrations.summary: Coexists with migrate-to-umbrella --add-repo (different semantics: add clones existing, migrate creates new). Reuses addRepoToUmbrella(), persistUmbrellaConfig(), execFileNoThrow(), detectRepository().

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI command, no UI. Helpful error messages for auth failures.

performance.summary: N/A - one-shot CLI command, no performance concerns beyond git clone network time.

security.summary: No PAT storage. Relies on user existing git credentials. No secrets handled by the command itself.

edge-cases.summary: Idempotent: skip clone if dir exists, register if not in config. Re-clone if registered but dir missing. Any valid git URL works for cloning; shorthand expansion GitHub-only v1.
